subject: Statistics
title: Interrupted Time Series
description: A quick win: understand Interrupted Time Series.

hook.text: A country bans texting while driving in January 2020. Accidents drop. Was it the law — or the trend?

buildup.text: Interrupted time series analyzes the trend before and after an intervention to detect a change in level or slope.

discovery.text: If the post-intervention data shifts below the projected pre-intervention trend, the policy likely had an effect.

twist.text: Other events happening at the same time — like a pandemic — can confound the analysis. Timing matters enormously.

climax.text: Adding a control series — a similar place without the intervention — strengthens the design significantly.

punchline.text: Plot the trend. Mark the intervention. Did the line change? That's your answer.

quiz.question: What does an interrupted time series design look for?
options: A change in the level or slope of a trend line after an intervention is introduced
A single data point that is an outlier
The average value of the entire time series
